Navigation

  • index
  • next |
  • previous |
  • Boolean Functions documentation »
  • APN_families

APN_families¶

  1//Li, Kangquan, and Nikolay Kaleyski. "Two new infinite families of APN functions in trivariate form." IEEE Transactions on Information Theory (2023).
  2
  3ReduceMod:=procedure(~f,n)
  4    T:=Terms(f);
  5    x:=Parent(f).1;
  6    M:=2^n-1;
  7    for t in T do
  8        e:=Exponents(t)[1];
  9        if e ge M then
 10            f +:=t;
 11            c:=LeadingCoefficient(t);
 12            e:=e mod M;
 13            f +:=(c*x^e);
 14        end if;
 15    end for;
 16end procedure;
 17
 18//--------------------------------------------------
 19//Power functions
 20
 21Gold:=function(n,i)
 22    if not IsOne(GCD(i,n)) then
 23        error "GCD(i,n) is not 1";
 24    end if;
 25    R:=PolynomialRing(GF(2^n));
 26    x:=R.1;
 27    return x^(2^i+1);
 28end function;
 29
 30Kasami:=function(n,i)
 31    if not IsOne(GCD(i,n)) then
 32        error "GCD(i,n) is not 1";
 33    end if;
 34    R:=PolynomialRing(GF(2^n));
 35    x:=R.1;
 36    return x^(2^(2*i)-2^i+1);
 37end function;
 38
 39Welch:=function(n)
 40    if not IsOdd(n) then
 41        error "n is not odd";
 42    end if;
 43    R:=PolynomialRing(GF(2^n));
 44    x:=R.1;
 45    t:=(n-1) div 2;
 46    return x^(2^t+3);
 47end function;
 48
 49Niho:=function(n)
 50    if not IsOdd(n) then
 51        error "n is not odd";
 52    end if;
 53    R:=PolynomialRing(GF(2^n));
 54    x:=R.1;
 55    t:=(n-1) div 2;
 56    if IsEven(t) then
 57        d:=2^t+2^(t div 2) -1;
 58    else
 59        d:=2^t+2^((3*t+1) div 2)-1;
 60    end if;
 61    return x^d;
 62end function;
 63
 64Inverse:=function(n)
 65    if not IsOdd(n) then
 66        error "n is not odd";
 67    end if;
 68    R:=PolynomialRing(GF(2^n));
 69    x:=R.1;
 70    return x^(2^n-2);
 71end function;
 72
 73Dobbertin:=function(n)
 74    if not IsDivisibleBy(n,5) then
 75        error "n is not divisible by 5";
 76    end if;
 77    R:=PolynomialRing(GF(2^n));
 78    x:=R.1;
 79    i:=n div 5;
 80    return x^(2^(4*i)+2^(3*i)+2^(2*i)+2^(i)-1);
 81end function;
 82
 83//--------------------------------------------------
 84//Quadratic APN polynomials
 85
 86//p=3
 87Family1:=function(n,s,u : CheckParameters:=true)
 88    p:=3;
 89    k:=n div p;
 90    K:=GF(2^n);
 91    if CheckParameters then
 92        if n lt 12 then
 93            error "n is not greather than or equal to 12";
 94        elif not IsDivisibleBy(n,p) then
 95            error "n is not divisible by p=3";
 96        elif not IsOne(GCD(k,3)) then
 97            error "GCD(k,3) is not 1";
 98        elif not IsOne(GCD(s,3*k)) then
 99            error "GCD(s,3k) is not 1";
100        elif not IsPrimitive(u) then
101            error "u is not primitive";
102        end if;
103    end if;
104    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
105    x:=R.1;
106    i:=(s*k) mod p;
107    m:=p-i;
108    e:=(2^(i*k)+2^(m*k+s)) mod (2^n-1);
109    return (x^(2^s+1) +u^(2^k-1) * x^(e));
110end function;
111
112//p=4
113Family2:=function(n,s,u : CheckParameters:=true)
114    p:=4;
115    k:=n div p;
116    K:=GF(2^n);
117    if CheckParameters then
118        if n lt 12 then
119            error "n is not greather than or equal to 12";
120        elif not IsDivisibleBy(n,p) then
121            error "n is not divisible by p=4";
122        elif not IsOne(GCD(k,3)) then
123            error "GCD(k,3) is not 1";
124        elif not IsOne(GCD(s,3*k)) then
125            error "GCD(s,3k) is not 1";
126        elif not IsPrimitive(u) then
127            error "u is not primitive";
128        end if;
129    end if;
130    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
131    x:=R.1;
132    i:=(s*k) mod p;
133    m:=p-i;
134    e:=(2^(i*k)+2^(m*k+s)) mod (2^n-1);
135    return (x^(2^s+1) +u^(2^k-1) * x^(e));
136end function;
137
138
139Family3:=function(n,i,c,s : CheckParameters:=true)
140    m:=n div 2;
141    q:=2^m;
142    K:=GF(q^2);
143    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
144    x:=R.1;
145    if CheckParameters then
146        if not IsEven(n) then
147            error "n is not even";
148        elif not IsOne(GCD(i,m)) then
149            error "GCD(i,m) is not 1 where m=n/2";
150        elif s in GF(2^m) then
151            error "s is in GF(2^m) where m=n/2";
152        else
153            P:=x^(2^i+1)+c*x^(2^i)+c^q *x+1;
154            ErrorMessage:="The polynomial P=X^(2^i+1)+c*X^(2^i)+c^q*X+1 has a solution x s.t. x^(q+1)=1";
155            if IsZero(Evaluate(P,One(K))) then
156                error ErrorMessage;
157            end if;
158            u:=(K.1)^(q-1); //generator of the cyclic subgroup of order q+1
159            if IsZero(Evaluate(P,u)) then
160                error ErrorMessage;
161            end if;
162            v:=u;
163            for j:=2 to q do
164                v *:=u;
165                if IsZero(Evaluate(P,v)) then
166                    error ErrorMessage;
167                end if;
168            end for;
169        end if;
170    end if;
171    return x*(x^(2^i) + x^q +c*x^((2^i) *q))+ x^(2^i) *(c^q *x^q + s*x^((2^i)*q))+x^((2^i+1)*q);
172end function;
173
174
175Family4:=function(n,a : CheckParameters:=true)
176    K:=GF(2^n);
177    if CheckParameters then
178        if IsZero(a) then
179            error "a is zero";
180        elif not a in K then
181            error "a is not in GF(2^n)";
182        end if;
183    end if;
184    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
185    x:=R.1;
186    return x^3+ a^(2^n-2) *(&+[a^(3*2^i) *x^((9*2^i) mod (2^n-1) ) : i in [0..(n-1)]]);
187end function;
188
189
190Family5:=function(n,a : CheckParameters:=true)
191    K:=GF(2^n);
192    if CheckParameters then
193        if not IsDivisibleBy(n,3) then
194            error "n is not divisible by 3";
195        elif IsZero(a) then
196            error "a is zero";
197        end if;
198    end if;
199    k:=n div 3;
200    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
201    x:=R.1;
202    return x^3+ a^(2^n-2) *(&+[a^(3*2^(3*i) ) *x^((9*2^(3*i) ) mod (2^n-1) ) +a^(6*2^(3*i) ) *x^((18*2^(3*i) ) mod (2^n-1) ) : i in [0..(k-1)]]);
203end function;
204
205
206Family6:=function(n,a : CheckParameters:=true)
207    K:=GF(2^n);
208    if CheckParameters then
209        if not IsDivisibleBy(n,3) then
210            error "n is not divisible by 3";
211        elif IsZero(a) then
212            error "a is zero";
213        end if;
214    end if;
215    k:=n div 3;
216    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
217    x:=R.1;
218    return x^3+ a^(2^n-2) *(&+[a^(12*2^(3*i) ) *x^((36*2^(3*i) ) mod (2^n-1) ) +a^(6*2^(3*i) ) *x^((18*2^(3*i) ) mod (2^n-1) ) : i in [0..(k-1)]]);
219end function;
220
221
222Family7to9:=function(n,s,u,v,w : CheckParameters:=true)
223    k:=n div 3;
224    K:=GF(2^n);
225    if CheckParameters then
226        if not IsDivisibleBy(n,3) then
227            error "n is not divisible by 3";
228        elif not IsOne(GCD(k,3)) then
229            error "GCD(k,3) is not 1";
230        elif not IsOne(GCD(s,n)) then
231            error "GCD(s,3k) is not 1";
232        elif not IsDivisibleBy(k+s,3) then
233            error "k+s is not divisible by 3 where k=n/3";
234        elif not IsPrimitive(u) then
235            error "u is not primitive";
236        elif not v in GF(2^k) then
237            error "v is not in GF(2^k) where k=n/3";
238        elif not w in GF(2^k) then
239            error "w is not in GF(2^k) where k=n/3";
240        elif IsOne(v*w) then
241            error "v*w=1";
242        end if;
243    end if;
244    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
245    x:=R.1;
246    return u*x^(2^s+1) + u^(2^k) *x^(2^(n-k)+2^(k+s)) +v*x^(2^(n-k)+1)+w*u^(2^k+1) *x^(2^s+2^(k+s));
247end function;
248
249
250Family10:=function(n,a,b,c : CheckParameters:=true)
251    m:=(n div 3);
252    q:=2^m;
253    K:=GF(q^3);
254    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
255    x:=R.1;
256    if CheckParameters then
257        if not IsDivisibleBy(n,3) then
258            error "n is not divisible by 3";
259        elif not IsOdd(m) then
260            error "m=n/3 is not odd";
261        else
262            L:=a*x^(q^2)+b*x^q+c*x;
263            ErrorMessage:="L=a*x^(q^2)+b*x^q+c*x where q=2^(n/3) does not satisfy the conditions";
264            d:=GCD(q-1,q^2+q+1);
265            if IsOne(d) then
266                d1:=d;
267            else
268                Fac:=Factorization(d);
269                d1:=1;
270                v:=q^2+q+1;
271                for t in Fac do
272                    p:=t[1];
273                    while IsDivisibleBy(v,p) do
274                        v:=v div p;
275                        d1 *:=p;
276                    end while;
277                end for;
278            end if;
279            zeta:=K.1;
280            u:=zeta^(d1*(q-1));
281            W:=[u^i *zeta^j: i in [1..( (q^2+q^1) div d1)], j in [0..(d1-1)]];
282            EvW:=[Evaluate(L,w): w in W];
283            for i1:=1 to #W do
284                if IsZero(EvW[i1]) or EvW[i1] eq W[i1] then
285                    error ErrorMessage;
286                end if;
287                for i2:=(i1+1) to #W do
288                    D:=W[i1]^2 *EvW[i2]+W[i2] *EvW[i1]^2;
289                    if not IsZero(D) then
290                        N:=W[i2]^2 *EvW[i1]+W[i1] *EvW[i2]^2;
291                        if IsZero(N) or N*(D^(-1)) in GF(q) then
292                            error ErrorMessage;
293                        end if;
294                    end if;
295                end for;
296            end for;
297        end if;
298    end if;
299    return (a^2*x^(2*q^2+1) +b^2*x^(2*q+1) +a*x^(q^2+2) +b*x^(q+2) +(c^2+c)*x^3 );
300end function;
301
302
303Family11:=function(n,i,k,a,b,c : CheckParameters:=true)
304    m:=n div 2;
305    if CheckParameters then
306        if not IsEven(n) then
307            error "n is not even";
308        elif not IsOdd(m) then
309            error "m is not odd";
310        elif IsDivisibleBy(m,3) then
311            error "m is divisible by 3";
312        elif not a in GF(4) and not IsPrimitive(GF(4)!a) then
313            error "a is not primitive in GF(4)";
314        elif not <n,i,k,b,c> eq <10,3,2,Zero(GF(2^n)),Zero(GF(2^n))> then
315            if not <a,b,c> eq <a,a^2,One(GF(2^n))> then
316                    error "(b,c) is not (a^2,1)";
317            elif IsEven(k) then
318                if not i in {m-2,m,n-1} and not IsOne((i*(m-2)) mod n) then
319                    error "i is not valid";
320                end if;
321            else
322                if not i in {m+2,m} and not IsOne((i*(m+2)) mod n) then
323                    error "i is not valid";
324                end if;
325            end if;
326        end if;
327    end if;
328    K:=GF(2^n);
329    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
330    x:=R.1;
331    q:=2^m;
332    return x^3+ a*x^((2^k) *(2^i+1)) + b*x^(3*q) + c*x^((2^k)*q*(2^i+1));
333end function;
334
335
336Family12:=function(n,i,s,a,b,c : CheckParameters:=true)
337    m:=(n div 2);
338    q:=2^m;
339    if CheckParameters then
340        if not IsEven(n) then
341            error "n is not even";
342        elif not IsOdd(m) then
343            error "m is not odd";
344        elif not IsOne(GCD(i,n)) then
345            error "GCD(i,n) is not 1";
346        elif a in GF(q) then
347            error "a is in GF(q) where q=2^(n/2)";
348        elif IsZero(b*c) then
349            error "b*c is zero";
350        else
351            bol:=false;
352            Cube:={u^3: u in GF(q^2)};
353            if s eq (3*i) then
354                bol:=(not b in Cube) and ((b^(2^(2*i)-2^i+1) *c^(-1)) in GF(q));
355            elif s eq (m-2*i) then
356                bol:=(not b in Cube) and ((b^(2^i-1) *c^(-2^(2*i))) in GF(q));
357            elif s eq (m+2*i) then
358                bol:=(not b in Cube) and ((c*b^(2^i-1)) in GF(q));
359            elif IsOne(i) and IsOne((s*(m-2)) mod n) then
360                bol:=(not b in Cube) and ((b^(2^(2*s)) *c^(-(2^s-1))) in GF(q));
361            elif s eq m then
362                bol:=(not b in Cube) and not (c in GF(q));
363            elif s eq (n-i) then
364                bol:=not ((b *c^(-2^i)) in GF(q));
365            end if;
366            if not bol then
367                error "The parameters do not satisfy Theorem 2";
368            end if;
369        end if;
370    end if;
371    K:=GF(2^n);
372    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
373    x:=R.1;
374    return a*((b*x^(2^i+1))+(b*x^(2^i+1))^q )+a^q*((c*x^(2^s+1))+(c*x^(2^s+1))^q);
375end function;
376
377
378Family13:=function(n,s,v,mu : CheckParameters:=true)
379    m:=(n div 3);
380    K:=GF(2^n);
381    R:=PolynomialRing(K);
382    x:=R.1;
383    L:=x^(2^(m+s))+mu*x^(2^s)+x;
384    if CheckParameters then
385        if not IsDivisibleBy(n,3) then
386            error "n is not divisible by 3";
387        elif not IsOne(GCD(s,m)) then
388            error "GCD(s,m) is not 1 where m=n/3";
389        elif not v in GF(2^m) or IsZero(v) then
390            error "v is not in the cyclic group of GF(2^m) where m=n/3";
391        elif IsZero(mu) then
392            error "mu is zero";
393        elif IsOne(mu^(2^(2*m)+2^m+1)) then
394            error "mu is zero";
395        else
396            for a in K do
397                if not IsZero(a) and IsZero(Evaluate(L,a)) then
398                    error "L=x^(2^(m+s))+mu*x^(2^s)+x does not permute GF(2^n)";
399                end if;
400            end for;
401        end if;
402    end if;
403    f:=L^(2^m+1) + v*x^(2^m+1);
404    ReduceMod(~f,n);
405    return f;
406end function;
407
408//--------------------------------------------------
409//Quadratic APN polynomials in bivariate form
410
411Family14:=function(m,k,i,a : CheckParameters:=true)
412    K:=GF(2^m);
413    if CheckParameters then
414        if IsOdd(m) then
415            error "m is not even";
416        elif not IsOne(GCD(k,m)) then
417            error "GCD(k,m) is not 1";
418        elif IsOdd(i) then
419            error "i is not even";
420        else
421            for b in K do
422                if b^3 eq a then
423                    error "a is a cube";
424                end if;
425            end for;
426        end if;
427    end if;
428    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
429    x:=R.1;
430    y:=R.2;
431    return [x*y,x^(2^k+1)+a*y^( (2^i) *(2^k+1))];
432end function;
433
434Family15:=function(m,i,a,b : CheckParameters:=true)
435    K:=GF(2^m);
436    if CheckParameters then
437        if not IsOne(GCD(i,m)) then
438            error "GCD(i,m) is not 1";
439        elif not a in GF(2) then
440            error "a is not in GF(2)";
441        else
442            L:=function(x) return x^(2^i+1) +a*x+b; end function;
443            for x in K do
444                if IsZero(L(x)) then
445                    error "x^(2^i+1) +a*b+b has a root in GF(2^m)";
446                end if;
447            end for;
448        end if;
449    end if;
450    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
451    x:=R.1;
452    y:=R.2;
453    return [x*y,x^(2^(2*i)+2^(3*i))+a*x^(2^(2*i)) *y^(2^i) +b*y^(2^i+1) ];
454end function;
455
456Family16:=function(m,i,b,c : CheckParameters:=true)
457    K:=GF(2^m);
458    l:=m div 2;
459    if CheckParameters then
460        if IsOdd(m) then
461            error "m is not even";
462        elif not IsOne(GCD(i,m)) then
463            error "GCD(i,m) is not 1";
464        else
465            L:=function(x) return (c*x^(2^i+1)+b*x^(2^i)+1)^(2^l+1)+x^(2^l+1); end function;
466            for x in K do
467                if IsZero(L(x)) then
468                    error "(c*x^(2^i+1)+b*x^(2^i)+1)^(2^l+1)+x^(2^l+1) has a root in GF(2^m)";
469                end if;
470            end for;
471        end if;
472    end if;
473    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
474    x:=R.1;
475    y:=R.2;
476    return [x*y,x^(2^i+1)+x^(2^(l+i)) *y^(2^l)+b*x*y^(2^i)+c*y^(2^i+1)];
477end function;
478
479Family17:=function(m,i : CheckParameters:=true)
480    K:=GF(2^m);
481    if CheckParameters then
482        if not IsOne(GCD(3*i,m)) then
483            error "GCD(3*i,m) is not 1";
484        end if;
485    end if;
486    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
487    x:=R.1;
488    y:=R.2;
489    return [x^(2^i+1)+x*y^(2^i)+y^(2^i+1) , x^(2^(2*i)+1)+x^(2^(2*i)) *y+y^(2^(2*i)+1)];
490end function;
491
492Family18:=function(m,i : CheckParameters:=true)
493    K:=GF(2^m);
494    if CheckParameters then
495        if not IsOne(GCD(3*i,m)) then
496            error "GCD(3*i,m) is not 1";
497        elif IsEven(m) then
498            error "m is not odd";
499        end if;
500    end if;
501    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
502    x:=R.1;
503    y:=R.2;
504    return [x^(2^i+1)+x*y^(2^i) +y^(2^i+1) , x^(2^(3*i)) *y+x*y^(2^(3*i))];
505end function;
506
507Family19:=function(m,i : CheckParameters:=true)
508    K:=GF(2^m);
509    if CheckParameters then
510        if not IsOne(GCD(3*i,m)) then
511            error "GCD(3*i,m) is not 1";
512        end if;
513    end if;
514    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
515    x:=R.1;
516    y:=R.2;
517    return [x^3+x*y^2+y^3+x*y,x^5+x^4*y+y^5+x*y+x^2 *y^2];
518end function;
519
520Family20:=function(m,k,a,B : CheckParameters:=true)
521    K:=GF(2^m);
522    r:=2^(k+ (m div 2));
523    q:=2^k;
524    if CheckParameters then
525        if not (m mod 4) eq 2 then
526            error "m mod 4 is not 2";
527        elif k le 0 or k ge m then
528            error "Not true that 0<k<m";
529        elif not IsOne(GCD(k,m)) then
530            error "GCD(k,m) is not 1";
531        elif IsZero(a) or not a in GF(2^(m div 2)) then
532            error "a is not in the cyclic group of GF(2^(m/2))";
533        elif IsZero(B^(q+r)+a^(q+1)) then
534            error "B^(q+r)=a^(q+1) where q=2^k, r=2^(k+m/2)";
535        else
536            for x in K do
537                if x^3 eq B then
538                    error "B is a cube";
539                end if;
540            end for;
541        end if;
542    end if;
543    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
544    x:=R.1;
545    y:=R.2;
546    return [x^(q+1)+B*y^(q+1), x^r *y+(a*B^(-1))*x*y^r];
547end function;
548
549Family21:=function(m,k,a : CheckParameters:=true)
550    K:=GF(2^m);
551    q:=2^k;
552    if CheckParameters then
553        if IsZero(k*m) then
554            error "Either m or k are zero";
555        elif not IsOne(GCD(k,m)) then
556            error "GCD(k,m) is not 1";
557        else
558            L:=function(x) return x^(q+1)+x+a; end function;
559            for x in K do
560                if IsZero(L(x)) then
561                    error "x^(2^k+1)+x+a has a root in GF(2^m)";
562                end if;
563            end for;
564        end if;
565    end if;
566    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
567    x:=R.1;
568    y:=R.2;
569    return [x^(q+1) +x*y^q+a*y^(q+1), x^(q^2+1)+a*x^(q^2)*y +(1+a)^q *x*y^(q^2)+a*y^(q^2+1)];
570end function;
571
572Family22:=function(m,a : CheckParameters:=true)
573    K:=GF(2^m);
574    if CheckParameters then
575        L:=function(x) return x^(3)+x+a; end function;
576        for x in K do
577            if IsZero(L(x)) then
578                error "x^3+x+a has a root in GF(2^m)";
579            end if;
580        end for;
581    end if;
582    R:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
583    x:=R.1;
584    y:=R.2;
585    return [x^3+x*y+x*y^2+a*y^3, x^5+x*y+a*x^2 *y^2 +a*x^4 *y +(1+a)^2 *x*y^4 +a*y^5];
586end function;
587
588//--------------------------------------------------
589//Quadratic APN polynomials in trivariate form
590
591Family23:=function(m,i : CheckParameters:=true)
592    K:=GF(2^m);
593    q:=2^i;
594    if CheckParameters then
595        if not IsOne(GCD(i,m)) then
596            error "GCD(i,m) is not 1";
597        elif not IsOdd(m) then
598            error "m is not odd";
599        elif not IsOne(GCD(m,7)) then
600            error "GCD(m,7) is not 1";
601        elif i gt 1 then
602            ErrorMessage:="Conditions not satisfied";
603            R2:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
604            X:=R2.1;
605            Y:=R2.2;
606            p:=1+Y^q+Y^(q^2)+Y^(q^2+q)+Y^(q^2+q+1)+X^(q^2)*Y+X^q*Y^(q^2)+X^(q^2+q)+X*Y^q+X*Y^(q^2+q)+X^(q^2+q+1);
607            for x,y in K do
608                if IsZero(Evaluate(p,[x,y])) then
609                    error ErrorMessage;
610                end if;
611            end for;
612        end if;
613    end if;
614    R:=PolynomialRing(K,3);
615    x:=R.1;
616    y:=R.2;
617    z:=R.3;
618    return [x^(q+1)+x^q*z+y*z^q, x^q *z +y^(q+1), x*y^q +y^q *z+z^(q+1)];
619end function;
620
621Family24:=function(m,i : CheckParameters:=true)
622    K:=GF(2^m);
623    q:=2^i;
624    if CheckParameters then
625        if not IsOne(GCD(i,m)) then
626            error "GCD(i,m) is not 1";
627        elif not IsOdd(m) then
628            error "m is not odd";
629        elif not IsOne(GCD(m,7)) then
630            error "GCD(m,7) is not 1";
631        elif i gt 1 then
632            ErrorMessage:="Conditions not satisfied";
633            R2:=PolynomialRing(K,2);
634            X:=R2.1;
635            Y:=R2.2;
636            p:=1+Y^(q^2)+Y^(q^2+q)+Y^(q^2+1)+Y^(q^2+q+1)+X^(q^2)+X^(q^2)*Y +X^q *Y^(q^2) +X*Y^q +X^(q+1)*Y^(q^2) +X^(q^2+q+1);
637            for x,y in K do
638                if IsZero(Evaluate(p,[x,y])) then
639                    error ErrorMessage;
640                end if;
641            end for;
642        end if;
643    end if;
644    R:=PolynomialRing(K,3);
645    x:=R.1;
646    y:=R.2;
647    z:=R.3;
648    return [x^(q+1)+x*y^q+y*z^q, x*y^q +z^(q+1), x^q *z +y^(q+1)+y^q *z];
649end function;
